message:
fix(server): prevent Instant underflow panic in health cache initializer

Instant::now() - Duration can panic if the result predates CLOCK_MONOTONIC
epoch (system boot). On Linux, if the server starts within ~31s of boot,
subtracting HEALTH_COUNT_CACHE_TTL + 1s from Instant::now() underflows.

Fix: initialize with (Instant::now(), None) and check cached.is_some()
in the read path so the first call always refreshes regardless of the
initial Instant value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
